title: goniophlebium pallens
intro: Goniophlebium pallens, also known as the pale goniophlebium, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia, specifically found in India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium pallens include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in local medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are believed to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
